description: A vertical graphic on a dark navy background with a faint Department of Homeland Security seal behind the text. A photograph of a pair of metal handcuffs runs along the right and bottom edges; one cuff is marked NO.368. White text in the upper left reads If you're a criminal, you won't stay. Arrest and removal follow.
notable_text: If you're a criminal, you won't stay. Arrest and removal follow.; NO.368
